name: Better Water Guide
description: A household water quality site for people who want cleaner, better-tasting water at home, covering under-sink filters, whole-house filtration, reverse osmosis, hard water, chlorine taste, filter replacement, water testing, shower filters, and cartridge maintenance.

footprint: warm kitchen layout with pantry-like organization, practical prep cues, and compact product decision cards
persona: a kitchen gear editor who helps home cooks choose appliances, cookware, storage, and cleanup tools without hype

author.bio: We help home cooks and households choose practical water filtration solutions, from under-sink RO to shower and whole-house systems, with clear maintenance guidance.
